title: Handle ErrDuplicateName errors from store.CreateContainer()
body: newBuilder(): When store.CreateContainer() returns a duplicate-name error for a name that we just made up, try again with a different made-up name.

comments.body: Oof.  I hadn't realized, but it would.
Change LGTM and I think I like this approach better then #1005 for the container name.  @steveb WDYT?
